# Name: # Custom partition layout for ESP32-C6 8 MB flash:
#   nvs   — 16 KB (kept for future use; nvs_flash subsystem is currently
#           NOT initialised at runtime — see main/main.c)
#   ota_0 — 1 MB app slot. Current release binary is well under that
#           (~600 KB; Arc 0 -Os shrink targets ≤450 KB). If a future
#           build edges past 1 MiB
#           clear
#   wad   — 7 MiB raw flash for the trimmed DOOM WAD. mmap'd at runtime
#           via esp_partition_mmap — NOT a filesystem. Flash separately
#           with tools/flash_wad.sh after `idf.py build flash`.
# Type/subtype 0x40 / 0x46 are deliberately outside ESP-IDF's reserved
# ranges so no IDF subsystem tries to interpret them.
# WAD sizing reference (numbers from tools/wad_audit.py + trim_wad.py
# with --strip all --prune-unused --pack --squash-patches):
#   - shareware DOOM1.WAD                                    4.0 MiB  ✓ fits
#   - DOOM_TRIM_E12.WAD  (E1+E2
#                                                            ~5.7 MiB ✓ fits
#   - DOOM_TRIM_E123.WAD (E1+E2+E3
#                                                            ~7.2 MiB ✓ fits
# The "pack" pipeline does WadPtr-style lossless dedup of SIDEDEFS rows
# (about half the SIDEDEFS bytes are duplicates)
# patch columns; "screens"/"intermission"/"fullscreens" are content-
# substituted with a 13-byte transparent placeholder (lump name kept so
# V_DrawPatch doesn't I_Error).
# Layout: 640 KiB app + 7.31 MiB wad. Binary is currently 497 KiB so
# 143 KiB growth headroom; wad partition fits the 7.20 MiB E1+E2+E3
# trim with ~110 KiB headroom.
nvs
ota_0
wad
